title: Explore the latest monday.com features - webinar

posts.author: Omer (Omer Fast)
posts.cookedHtml:
Join our live webinar to explore monday.com’s latest updates, and learn how to turn new features into real workflow improvements through a hands-on use case.

What you’ll learn:

  • The latest features from this quarter’s release, with live demos
  • Real use cases to help you apply new capabilities immediately

image1050×660 70.9 KB

posts.author: Karmon (Karen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Omer,

Thanks for the heads-up, just registered. Looking forward to seeing how the new features can fit into our team’s workflows. The real use cases sound especially helpful. Appreciate you sharing the link!
